name: Grounding Spatial Relations: Instruction Leakage and a Goal-Free Dynamics Fix

four_principles_filter.去粗取精: 研讨厅按 intake_score≥0.6 + 子系统匹配入库
four_principles_filter.去伪存真: 代码级落地/规划态已在决策中标注
four_principles_filter.由表及里: 研讨厅驱动正式入库固化

digest_notes: We identify a trap in compact world models: a goal-conditioned predictor achieves 0.90 relation-readout accuracy, yet this is instruction transcription, not perception. Withholding the goal collapses it to chance (0.90→0.27). A counterfactual instruction makes the predicted anchors follow the false instruction 94.5% of the time. We characterize the confound as instruction leakage: when the scored quantity is transcribable from the instruction. The diagnosis prescribes a goal-free dynamics fix.
